name: Obsidian MCP Tools
what_it_does: An Obsidian plugin that creates a secure MCP server bridge between an Obsidian vault and AI assistants like Claude Desktop, enabling semantic search over notes and execution of Templater templates via AI.
use_cases: Ask Claude to search your Obsidian vault semantically for notes related to a topic
Have Claude execute Obsidian Templater templates with dynamic parameters during AI conversations
Reference personal notes and knowledge base content inside Claude Desktop without copy-pasting
Keep vault data local and private while still allowing AI-assisted retrieval
not_for: Users who don't use Obsidian as their note-taking app
Teams needing shared or multi-user vault access
Non-Claude MCP clients without compatible tooling
best_when: You use Obsidian as your primary PKM and want Claude Desktop to read and search your notes without manual copy-paste, while keeping data local.
avoid_when: You use a different note-taking app, or need the AI to write back to the vault rather than just read it.

auth.notes: Requires Local REST API plugin with API key. Keys stored in platform-specific credential storage. All communication encrypted.

pricing.notes: Open-source; requires Obsidian (free or paid) and Claude Desktop.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Plugin surfaces errors from underlying Local REST API; quality depends on that layer.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Read-only vault access is inherently idempotent; template execution may have side effects.
known_agent_gotchas: Requires Smart Connections plugin installed separately for semantic search
Requires Templater plugin for template execution feature
Server binary is auto-downloaded; agents should handle initial setup delay
Read-only access means agents cannot write notes back to vault
